title: IoT Dashboard
desc: Control your device from your phone, anywhere in the world!
fullDesc: Connect your Arduino to the internet using an ESP8266 WiFi module and control LEDs and sensors from a web dashboard on your phone. This project introduces you to the Internet of Things — the technology behind smart homes, smart cities, and Industry 4.0! Build your own cloud-connected dashboard and monitor data from anywhere.
author: Tinkering Lab
